channel.title: +Articles on hindu-vichArAH हिन्दु-विचाराः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on hindu-vichArAH हिन्दु-विचाराः

item.title: Muslim soldiers in hindu armies
item.description: Source: TW Muslim soldiers in Hindu armies - How does Islam view them? Amir Khusrow tells us in Khazainul Futuh - During Malik Kafur’s Malabar campaign a body of Mussalmans had allied themselves with a Hindu Raja and had violated the law of the Quran, ‘Do not make the infidels your friends against the Mussalmans’ (Quran 4:144) Seeing that the Hindu raja was being defeated, they changed sides and surrendered to Malik Kafur.

item.title: POK Treachery
item.description: Black Day in Kashmir : How PoK was lost due to treachery of Muslim soldiers of Kashmir Army By Pawan Pandey October 22, 2020 The government has declared the 22nd of October this year to be the black day in the Union Territory Jammu and Kashmir.+++(5)+++ This is the day Pakistan supported tribal jihadis and attacked the erstwhile princely state of Jammu and Kashmir from the west. They plundered, raped, and murdered all through their victorious march until the very edges of capital Srinagar.
